sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Ka lungmuan na khat om, Lau ke'n kata aw ci,
Na lampi kong honsak lungkham na kuampi te,

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Vangliat na khempeuh kong pia zo,
Keina hong up uhleh keima bawl sang lian zaw,
Na bawl thei dinguh hi, ka kammal te nungkik lo.

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: Khasiangtho in hongsawl, Topa minthan na ding
Na khut te tung'h vangliatna kong koih,
Na mukte hong lawngin, ka thu leh ka kammal te,
Kong koihsak khin zo hi, lau kei in.

sections.label: Verse 3
lines: Na gual lelhna lampi, Gualzawhna tawh na tawn
ding, Thahat in la hangin hong ci,
Lauke'n la lungkia ke'n, Na mai ah gualzawh na in,
Hongngak cih tel in la lau kei in.
